env3.headline: Data centres in a heatwave: heaping demand on stretched electric grid during climate crisis
env3.deck: Soaring temperatures lead to rising use of air conditioning to keep servers cool, exacerbating the heat outside
env3.teaser: Soaring temperatures lead to rising use of air conditioning to keep servers cool, exacerbating the heat outside
body:
Soaring temperatures lead to rising use of air conditioning to keep servers cool, exacerbating the heat outside

Keeping cool has not just been a problem for people in Ireland and the rest of Europe these past few weeks. The data centres that power our smartphones, tablets and online lives are also straining.
